topic: calibration-aware active learning for image classification

method_matrix.title: The AI Scientist: Towards Fully Automated Open-Ended Scientific Discovery
method_matrix.method: The AI Scientist generates novel research ideas, writes code, executes experiments, visualizes results, writes full scientific papers, and conducts simulated peer review using large language models.
method_matrix.best_result: Papers exceeding acceptance threshold at a top machine learning conference as judged by automated reviewer.

key_results.near_human_performance: automated reviewer achieves near-human performance in evaluating paper scores
key_results.acceptance_threshold: papers exceed acceptance threshold at a top machine learning conference

method_matrix.title: The AI Scientist-v2: Workshop-Level Automated Scientific Discovery via Agentic Tree Search
method_matrix.method: The AI Scientist-v2 eliminates reliance on human-authored code templates, generalizes across diverse machine learning domains, and employs a novel progressive agentic tree-search methodology managed by a dedicated experiment manager agent, with an enhanced AI reviewer component integrating a Vision-Language Model (VLM) feedback loop for iterative refinement of figure content and aesthetics.
method_matrix.best_result: First fully AI-generated paper successfully navigating peer review with acceptance above human threshold

method_matrix.title: Agent Laboratory: Using LLM Agents as Research Assistants
method_matrix.method: Agent Laboratory is a framework that uses LLM agents to conduct research through three stages (literature review, experimentation, and report writing), producing code repositories and research reports with human feedback at each stage.
method_matrix.best_result: 84% decrease in research expenses compared to previous autonomous research methods

method_matrix.title: MLE-bench: Evaluating Machine Learning Agents on Machine Learning Engineering
method_matrix.method: MLE-bench evaluates ML engineering capabilities by creating diverse tasks from Kaggle competitions, establishing human baselines using Kaggle leaderboards, and testing frontier language models with open-source agent scaffolds.

method_matrix.title: AIBuildAI-2: Scalable Agentic AI Research and Engineering
method_matrix.method: AIBuildAI-2 is a knowledge-enhanced agent with an external, evolving knowledge system that automatically builds AI models using a hierarchical knowledge structure that dynamically loads relevant context.
method_matrix.best_result: First place on MLE-Bench with 70.7% medal rate

method_matrix.title: Reflexion: Language Agents with Verbal Reinforcement Learning
method_matrix.method: Uses verbal feedback and memory to help agents improve across trials, motivating explicit failure memory and revision loops.

method_matrix.title: Self-Refine: Iterative Refinement with Self-Feedback
method_matrix.method: Research paper: Self-Refine: Iterative Refinement with Self-Feedback

method_matrix.title: Voyager: An Open-Ended Embodied Agent with Large Language Models
method_matrix.method: Demonstrates open-ended skill acquisition with memory and iterative exploration, relevant to long-running agent loops and durable lessons.

method_matrix.title: AgentBench: Evaluating LLMs as Agents
method_matrix.method: Introduces agent evaluation tasks and motivates structured benchmarks for agent behavior rather than isolated text quality.

method_matrix.title: SWE-agent: Agent-Computer Interfaces Enable Automated Software Engineering
method_matrix.method: SWE-agent introduces a custom agent-computer interface (ACI) that enables language model agents to autonomously use computers to solve software engineering tasks by enhancing their ability to create/edit code files, navigate repositories, and execute tests and programs.

method_matrix.title: Multi-Tier Labeling and Physics-Informed Learning for Orbital Anomaly Detection at Scale
method_matrix.method: The paper presents a multi-tier labeling cascade that combines three weak supervision sources (physics rule set, IMM-UKF bank, and supplemental-element calibration) to produce labels at scale, followed by training a 6.5M-parameter Transformer in two stages for orbital anomaly detection.
limitations: The model is framed as a high-recall triage classifier for surfacing candidate events, not for issuing final attributions

method_matrix.title: VNDUQE: Information-Theoretic Novelty Detection using Deep Variational Information Bottleneck
method_matrix.method: The paper uses Deep Variational Information Bottleneck (VIB) to constrain information flow through learned representations for novelty detection.
method_matrix.best_result: 100% AUROC on noise for far-OOD samples using KL divergence
